					Urban, all-in-one wedding venues in Denver with versatile indoor/outdoor space to celebrate weddings in unforgettable style.				
				
				
				
									
					
						
									Discover the Perfect Venue
					
					
				
								
				
				
					
				
		
					
				
				
					Mile High Station				
				
		
		
				
				
									Once home to Midwest Steel and Ironworks, Mile High Station blends its 100-year-old industrial roots with contemporary design to create a one-of-a-kind Denver wedding spot. Original brick walls, exposed steel beams, and eclectic details give the venue its unique character, while modern amenities like an elevated mezzanine, two grand chandeliers, and an inviting outdoor patio make it the perfect spot for saying “I do.” It’s full of character and can be transformed to suit your style. Whether you’re hosting an intimate wedding or a large reception, Mile High Station’s versatile spaces provide a stunning backdrop that guests won’t soon forget.
